title: ATM Heist in AP: Thieves Uproot Machine, Escape in SUV
description: In a shocking early morning incident in Dharmavaram, Sri Sathya Sai district, three masked men stole an entire ATM after failing to break it open, dragging it away with a Bolero SUV and fleeing towards Battalapalli; police are examining CCTV footage to trace the suspects.
